source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, the straight line $y=x+b$ intersects with the coordinate axes at two points. What is the range of $x$ when $y>0$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} From the graph, it is known that the intersection point of the line with the x-axis is ($-2, 0$),\\
when $y>0$, the graph is above the x-axis, on the right side of the intersection point with the x-axis,\\
therefore, when $x>-2$, $y>0$\\
Hence, the answer is: $\boxed{x>-2}$

image_dependency: 题干显式写有“As shown in the figure”，需要从图中读取直线与坐标轴的位置关系。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要不在文字中。
仅凭题面公式 y=x+b 无法确定 b，需依赖图像判断截距后才能得到 x 的范围。
multi_step: 需要先从图像中识别直线截距或 b 的值，再解不等式 y=x+b>0。
推理至少包含“读图确定参数”与“代数求解范围”两步，但整体计算较简单。
答案为 x>-2，表明任务不是直接读数，还涉及由图到式再到不等式区间的转换。
verifiability: 答案形式是简短明确的不等式 x>-2，便于规则化核验。
若从图中可确认 b=2，则可直接验证 y=x+2>0 推出 x>-2。
registry_passed=true 且 answer_present=true，基础资产完整，可进行后续核验。

decision_reasons: question and answer are present, so the core task is still recoverable
the image asset exists, but the problem is highly image-dependent for determining the key parameter from the figure
image quality is risky for recovery because the primary image is small (148x132) and flagged with moderate readability
metadata.image_field is null and there is an answer-type mismatch flag, so the sample needs follow-up rather than immediate keep
